sections.paragraph:
Original: קציר

Transliteration: qâtsı̂yr

Phonetic: kaw-tseer'

BDB Definition:

  1. harvest, harvesting
    1. process of harvesting
    2. crop, what is harvested or reaped
    3. time of harvest
  2. boughs, branches

Origin: from H7114

TWOT entry: 2062a,2062b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
